steps.action: Open http://localhost:3102 and inspect swap card default state below the swap inputs/CTA
steps.expected: Price details section is collapsed by default
steps.observed: Only the collapsed trigger button text 'Enter an amount to see price details' was visible; detail rows were not visible before interaction.

steps.action: Click the collapsed price details trigger
steps.expected: Section expands and shows exchange rate, price impact, and minimum received rows
steps.observed: Section expanded and rendered placeholder rows: 'Exchange rate —', 'Price impact —', and 'Minimum received —' in no-quote state.

evidence.network: No network requests captured by agent-browser during this UI-only expand/collapse validation.

summary: VAL-SWAP-010 passed: the price details control is collapsed by default and expands to show exchange rate, price impact, and minimum received rows with placeholders in no-quote state.
